verdict.answer_first: B states it immediately: "Server-side rendered — or more precisely, prerendered/static — not client-side." A also answers first, but with more framing: "server-side rendering — and ideally static generation (SSG)".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits harder to one recommendation: "not client-side" and "this isn't close." A is decisive too, but says "almost certainly" and then surveys SSG/SSR/ISR.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now: pick prerendered/static, use runtime SSR only for per-request pieces, and hydrate interactive bits.
